_comment: Authoritative classification of every canonical data file: is it WATCHED by a registered source (so a change upstream flags it for review), intentionally STATIC (creator/template-derived, no upstream), DATED (internal data on a calendar cadence), or TOOL-MANAGED (owned by another tool). This resolves the P33 audit's 'orphaned data file' finding permanently: a future audit reads this map instead of re-flagging. Watched files name the registry source_ids that feed them; source_currency.py mark-checked --changed on one of those sources surfaces the file to update.

files.reason: YouTube algorithm signal weights; refresh when a watching source changes
Reels signal model + embedded Pinterest v5 block
TikTok API product catalog; self-declares a 14-day verify cycle
OSS SEO methodology digest; P33 registered its GitHub upstream (previously orphaned)
materials cost library; values null until verified against a cited vendor URL
rate + metric benchmark rows; metric ranges null until sourced (never estimated)
per-platform format/spec rows; refresh when a platform-spec source changes
internal seasonal windows derived from seo-intelligence-engine; roll reference_year annually (the windows recur each year), no external upstream
prose companion to seasonal.json; reviewed on the same annual cadence
placeholder example keywords; replaced per-deployment from creator-profile.local.json, no upstream
niche entity/brand vocabulary template; curated, no external upstream
per-pillar long-tail seed template; curated, no external upstream
five audience personas; creator-profile derived, intentionally stable
competitor snapshot index; populated and refreshed by competitor_snapshot.py on the competitor-page cadence, not the registry
framing dimensions and fastening cited to IRC R602; review on a code-edition change
stair geometry, handrails, guards cited to IRC R311.7 and R312
deck ledger, lateral load, spans cited to IRC R507 and AWC DCA6
footings, frost depth, slab, vapor retarder cited to IRC R403 and R506
shingle slope, underlayment, ice barrier, fastening cited to IRC R905
emergency escape openings and wells cited to IRC R310
receptacles, GFCI/AFCI, box fill, ampacity cited to the NEC; review on an adopted NEC edition change
drain slope, traps, venting cited to IPC 704/909 and IRC P3005
Manual J/S/D sizing cited to IRC M1401.3
fastener spacing and garage fire separation cited to IRC R702 and R302.6
R-value by climate zone and vapor control from the DOE BASC public-domain table and IECC R402
water-resistive barrier and flashing cited to IRC R703
material-layer R-values and assembly build-up from NREL (BSD-3) and DOE BASC
HVHZ, wind, termite, flood, NC climate zones and county-to-zone mapping
the edition watch: adopted editions (FL 8th, NC 2018/2015-IRC) and pending transitions (NC 2024, FL 9th); review when a watching source announces a change
CC0 construction term definitions seeded from Wikidata
index of authored CC0 SVGs and link-only references; authored, no external upstream

_note: WATCHED = a registered source feeds it; on mark-checked --changed of that source, review this file. DATED = internal data on a calendar cadence. STATIC = no upstream by design. TOOL-MANAGED = another tool owns it.
